title: Odoland Cat Litter Mat, 2PCS Litter Trapping Mat Scatter Control Silicone Pet Litter Mat Waterpoof Non-Slip Washable Kitten Cat Mat for Toilet (Gray&Black)
features: Cat Litter Trapping Mat Set:1 × Grey + 1 × Black (53*38cm), 1 ×brush (Cat Litter Box Not Included). The cat litter mats has a structured surface for good collection of small balls. In addition, with a border height of 0.8 cm, leak proof which does not spill on the floor to keep the area around the litter box mat clean and hygienic.

Recycling Using: simply pick up the cat litter trapping mat which will fall out. You can then pour it back into the litter tray and reuse it. Saves on the cost of litter and the overflowing sand can be used without waste.

Durable & Waterproof: 100% food grade silica gel, BPA free, in line with FDA strict monitoring, this cat mat will not cause any harm to your pet cat. Soft silicone, better protection for your cat's paws and your kitten will love the feeling of stepping on it. Waterproof design to prevent staining of the floor by cat urine or water penetration
Washable & Easy to Clean: Easily removes dirt, pet litter tray mat which can be cleaned with our brush and only needs to be cleaned with water or rinsed with a hose.

Universal Size: 53x38cm size is enough for a kitten or an adult cat. The cat litter catcher mat is suitable for most cat litter boxes. Non slip designed so it can hold the litter on the mat and keep your floor clean.
